subcodes.first_line: Why dost thou remain silent while the Tree proclaimeth throughout the world: "Verily, there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Bestower" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ا تکون صامتا و السدره تنطق بین العالم انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الوهاب کن
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
